body:
It looks like this constructor was indeed removed by mistake in #3482.
This is a change that breaks several other codes / packages. I reintroduce it here.

On the other hand, if we want to keep it out of the codebase, I will switch this PR to a version bump. 
I vote for reintroducing this convenience constructor.
title: Go back to support `BoundaryCondition(Classification, args...)`

body:
This PR reorders the documentation and will add a `Grids` and `Fields` page to the top-level of the docs. It will also clean up minor outstanding issues.

Longer description of our intent: #3672 

Closes #3649
title: The start of documentation 2.0
